title: List of Friends
summary: Use a list to hold more than one name.
mission_prompt: Make a list of friends, then print each friend.
learning_goals: Use a list to keep many things together.
Use a for loop to visit each list item.
Print each item in the list.
hints: The loop gives you one friend at a time.
adult_guidance: Describe the list as a row of labeled cards the loop visits one by one.
